Hardware Component File

Cluster _XBG_L1_China_v1.0

System Identification and Configuration Data

Metadata

File reference Cluster__XBG_L1_China_v1.0_20180709T122730.json
Source type JSON Data Array
Status
Validated

Technical Warning

Ensure specific OBD protocol matching before hardware implementation to avoid controller lockout.

Safety Guidelines →

OBD Configuration Details

Protocol CAN
Baudrate 10400
Send ID 743
Receive ID 763
Functional Addr 51
Functional Name Tableau de bord

Automatic Identifiers

Array Listing 1 Entries 
[
  {
    "diagversion": "22",
    "supplier": "AGZ",
    "soft": "0001",
    "version": "0000"
